description: Editable run-sheet JSON for terrain material generation before manual 136x112 tile assembly.
recommendedModel: Flux Kontext Pro or Flux 1.1 Pro
goal: Generate terrain source materials and overlays that can be manually assembled to the runtime tile contract.

defaults.seedStrategy: keep one terrain family per seed family to reduce drift between variants

operatorChecklist: Generate source materials and overlays first, not final tiles.
Assemble final 136x112 blocks manually on the tile template.
Protect the 68x34 top-diamond read and 68x22 side-face read.
Reject any terrain variant that hides the unit occupancy center.
